name: Union Petrochemical Public Company Limited
summary: Union Petrochemical Public Company Limited imports and distributes chemical products primarily in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Commodity Chemicals, Specialty Chemicals, and Others. It is also involved in the distribution of plastic pellets, lubricants, and computer equipment; provision of computer system services; and sale of oil-refinery and power plant equipment. In addition, the company sells pharmaceutical and medical products, fragrances and skin-care cosmetics, and supplements. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
